title: Language Change - Earbuds/Headsets are out of date and smart Charge Chase/Stand is up to date
scenario: Language change and DFU should complete successfully when earbuds are on outdated firmware but smart charge case is on latest firmware on Voyager Free 60+
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Tap on the connected device (e.g., Voyager Free 60+) to enter Device Settings.
3. Ensure the earbuds/headset are on an outdated firmware version.
4. Ensure the smart charge case/stand is on the latest firmware version.
6. Select a different language from the available options.
8. Observe if a Device Firmware Update (DFU) prompt appears.
9. If prompted, initiate the DFU process to update all components to the latest firmware version.
10. Wait for the firmware update to complete.
11. Verify the language on the earbuds/headset has changed to the selected language.
12. Verify the language on the smart charge case (e.g., Voyager Free 60+) has also changed to the selected language.
expected: The language change and DFU complete successfully. All components (earbuds/headset and smart charge case/stand) are updated to the latest firmware version. The language on both the earbuds/headset and the smart charge case changes to the selected language.
